mapper.select:
SELECT CP_ID , CP_NM, CP_TYPE_CD, DECODE(CP_TYPE_CD, '1', '국내','2', '해외') AS CP_TYPE_NM, EQUIP_ID, IF_NM, EQUIP_ALIAS, IF_DESC, COLLECT_Y4MMDD, PHYSICAL_SPEED , DAY01_AVG_INBPS, DAY01_AVG_OUTBPS, DAY01_MAX_INBPS, DAY01_MAX_OUTBPS, DAY02_AVG_INBPS, DAY02_AVG_OUTBPS, DAY02_MAX_INBPS, DAY02_MAX_OUTBPS, DAY03_AVG_INBPS, DAY03_AVG_OUTBPS, DAY03_MAX_INBPS, DAY03_MAX_OUTBPS, DAY04_AVG_INBPS, DAY04_AVG_OUTBPS, DAY04_MAX_INBPS, DAY04_MAX_OUTBPS, DAY05_AVG_INBPS, DAY05_AVG_OUTBPS, DAY05_MAX_INBPS, DAY05_MAX_OUTBPS, DAY06_AVG_INBPS, DAY06_AVG_OUTBPS, DAY06_MAX_INBPS, DAY06_MAX_OUTBPS, DAY07_AVG_INBPS, DAY07_AVG_OUTBPS, DAY07_MAX_INBPS, DAY07_MAX_OUTBPS, DAY08_AVG_INBPS, DAY08_AVG_OUTBPS, DAY08_MAX_INBPS, DAY08_MAX_OUTBPS, DAY09_AVG_INBPS, DAY09_AVG_OUTBPS, DAY09_MAX_INBPS, DAY09_MAX_OUTBPS, DAY10_AVG_INBPS, DAY10_AVG_OUTBPS, DAY10_MAX_INBPS, DAY10_MAX_OUTBPS, DAY11_AVG_INBPS, DAY11_AVG_OUTBPS, DAY11_MAX_INBPS, DAY11_MAX_OUTBPS, DAY12_AVG_INBPS, DAY12_AVG_OUTBPS, DAY12_MAX_INBPS, DAY12_MAX_OUTBPS, DAY13_AVG_INBPS, DAY13_AVG_OUTBPS, DAY13_MAX_INBPS, DAY13_MAX_OUTBPS, DAY14_AVG_INBPS, DAY14_AVG_OUTBPS, DAY14_MAX_INBPS, DAY14_MAX_OUTBPS, DAY15_AVG_INBPS, DAY15_AVG_OUTBPS, DAY15_MAX_INBPS, DAY15_MAX_OUTBPS, DAY16_AVG_INBPS, DAY16_AVG_OUTBPS, DAY16_MAX_INBPS, DAY16_MAX_OUTBPS, DAY17_AVG_INBPS, DAY17_AVG_OUTBPS, DAY17_MAX_INBPS, DAY17_MAX_OUTBPS, DAY18_AVG_INBPS, DAY18_AVG_OUTBPS, DAY18_MAX_INBPS, DAY18_MAX_OUTBPS, DAY19_AVG_INBPS, DAY19_AVG_OUTBPS, DAY19_MAX_INBPS, DAY19_MAX_OUTBPS, DAY20_AVG_INBPS, DAY20_AVG_OUTBPS, DAY20_MAX_INBPS, DAY20_MAX_OUTBPS, DAY21_AVG_INBPS, DAY21_AVG_OUTBPS, DAY21_MAX_INBPS, DAY21_MAX_OUTBPS, DAY22_AVG_INBPS, DAY22_AVG_OUTBPS, DAY22_MAX_INBPS, DAY22_MAX_OUTBPS, DAY23_AVG_INBPS, DAY23_AVG_OUTBPS, DAY23_MAX_INBPS, DAY23_MAX_OUTBPS, DAY24_AVG_INBPS, DAY24_AVG_OUTBPS, DAY24_MAX_INBPS, DAY24_MAX_OUTBPS, DAY25_AVG_INBPS, DAY25_AVG_OUTBPS, DAY25_MAX_INBPS, DAY25_MAX_OUTBPS, DAY26_AVG_INBPS, DAY26_AVG_OUTBPS, DAY26_MAX_INBPS, DAY26_MAX_OUTBPS, DAY27_AVG_INBPS, DAY27_AVG_OUTBPS, DAY27_MAX_INBPS, DAY27_MAX_OUTBPS, DAY28_AVG_INBPS, DAY28_AVG_OUTBPS, DAY28_MAX_INBPS, DAY28_MAX_OUTBPS, DAY29_AVG_INBPS, DAY29_AVG_OUTBPS, DAY29_MAX_INBPS, DAY29_MAX_OUTBPS, DAY30_AVG_INBPS, DAY30_AVG_OUTBPS, DAY30_MAX_INBPS, DAY30_MAX_OUTBPS, DAY31_AVG_INBPS, DAY31_AVG_OUTBPS, DAY31_MAX_INBPS, DAY31_MAX_OUTBPS FROM ( SELECT T.CP_ID , CM.CP_NM , CM.CP_TYPE_CD, T.COLLECT_Y4MMDD , T.PHYSICAL_SPEED , SUBSTR(T.COLLECT_Y4MMDD,-2) DD , T.EQUIP_ID , T.IF_NM , FE.EQUIP_ALIAS , FI.IF_DESC , T.AVG_INBPS , T.MAX_INBPS , T.AVG_OUTBPS , T.MAX_OUTBPS FROM MDB_CP_IF_TRAFFIC_DD T INNER JOIN TB_EQUIP_MST FE ON T.EQUIP_ID = FE.EQUIP_ID INNER JOIN TB_IF_MST FI ON T.EQUIP_ID = FI.EQUIP_ID AND T.IF_NM = FI.IF_NM INNER JOIN TB_CP_LIST_MST CM ON CM.CP_ID = T.CP_ID
AND CM.CP_TYPE_CD = #{search_type_nm}
AND CM.CP_NM LIKE '%' || #{search_cp_nm} || '%'
AND T.IF_NM LIKE '%' || #{search_ll_num} || '%'
AND FE.EQUIP_ALIAS LIKE '%' || #{search_alias} || '%'
AND T.IF_NM LIKE '%' || #{search_if_nm} || '%'
AND T.COLLECT_Y4MMDD LIKE #{search_date} || '%'
) PIVOT ( MAX(ROUND(AVG_INBPS,1)) AVG_INBPS , MAX(ROUND(AVG_OUTBPS,1)) AVG_OUTBPS , MAX(ROUND(MAX_INBPS,1)) MAX_INBPS , MAX(ROUND(MAX_OUTBPS,1)) MAX_OUTBPS FOR DD IN ( '01' AS DAY01, '02' AS DAY02, '03' AS DAY03, '04' AS DAY04, '05' AS DAY05, '06' AS DAY06, '07' AS DAY07, '08' AS DAY08, '09' AS DAY09, '10' AS DAY10, '11' AS DAY11, '12' AS DAY12, '13' AS DAY13, '14' AS DAY14, '15' AS DAY15, '16' AS DAY16, '17' AS DAY17, '18' AS DAY18, '19' AS DAY19, '20' AS DAY20, '21' AS DAY21, '22' AS DAY22, '23' AS DAY23, '24' AS DAY24, '25' AS DAY25, '26' AS DAY26, '27' AS DAY27, '28' AS DAY28, '29' AS DAY29, '30' AS DAY30, '31' AS DAY31 ) )

SELECT CLS_CD, IDC_CENTER_NM, COLLECT_TIME, COLLECT_Y4MM, DAY01_INBPS, DAY01_OUTBPS, DAY02_INBPS, DAY02_OUTBPS, DAY03_INBPS, DAY03_OUTBPS, DAY04_INBPS, DAY04_OUTBPS, DAY05_INBPS, DAY05_OUTBPS, DAY06_INBPS, DAY06_OUTBPS, DAY07_INBPS, DAY07_OUTBPS, DAY08_INBPS, DAY08_OUTBPS, DAY09_INBPS, DAY09_OUTBPS, DAY10_INBPS, DAY10_OUTBPS, DAY11_INBPS, DAY11_OUTBPS, DAY12_INBPS, DAY12_OUTBPS, DAY13_INBPS, DAY13_OUTBPS, DAY14_INBPS, DAY14_OUTBPS, DAY15_INBPS, DAY15_OUTBPS, DAY16_INBPS, DAY16_OUTBPS, DAY17_INBPS, DAY17_OUTBPS, DAY18_INBPS, DAY18_OUTBPS, DAY19_INBPS, DAY19_OUTBPS, DAY20_INBPS, DAY20_OUTBPS, DAY21_INBPS, DAY21_OUTBPS, DAY22_INBPS, DAY22_OUTBPS, DAY23_INBPS, DAY23_OUTBPS, DAY24_INBPS, DAY24_OUTBPS, DAY25_INBPS, DAY25_OUTBPS, DAY26_INBPS, DAY26_OUTBPS, DAY27_INBPS, DAY27_OUTBPS, DAY28_INBPS, DAY28_OUTBPS, DAY29_INBPS, DAY29_OUTBPS, DAY30_INBPS, DAY30_OUTBPS, DAY31_INBPS, DAY31_OUTBPS FROM ( SELECT C.CLS_CD , C.IDC_CENTER_NM , TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(COLLECT_Y4MMDDH24||COLLECT_MIN,'YYYYMMDDHH24MI'),'HH24:MI') COLLECT_TIME , TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(COLLECT_Y4MMDDH24||COLLECT_MIN,'YYYYMMDDHH24MI'),'DD') COLLECT_DD , TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(COLLECT_Y4MMDDH24||COLLECT_MIN,'YYYYMMDDHH24MI'),'YYYYMM') COLLECT_Y4MM , ROUND(AVG(INBPS)) INBPS , ROUND(AVG(OUTBPS)) OUTBPS FROM TB_IDC_IF_CURTRF_DTL C
AND C.CLS_CD = #{search_cls}
AND C.IDC_CENTER_NM LIKE '%' || #{search_idc} || '%'
AND C.COLLECT_Y4MMDDH24 LIKE #{search_date}||'%'
GROUP BY C.COLLECT_Y4MMDDH24||C.COLLECT_MIN,C.CLS_CD, C.IDC_CENTER_NM ) PIVOT ( AVG(INBPS) INBPS , AVG(OUTBPS) OUTBPS FOR COLLECT_DD IN ( '01' AS DAY01, '02' AS DAY02, '03' AS DAY03, '04' AS DAY04, '05' AS DAY05, '06' AS DAY06, '07' AS DAY07, '08' AS DAY08, '09' AS DAY09, '10' AS DAY10, '11' AS DAY11, '12' AS DAY12, '13' AS DAY13, '14' AS DAY14, '15' AS DAY15, '16' AS DAY16, '17' AS DAY17, '18' AS DAY18, '19' AS DAY19, '20' AS DAY20, '21' AS DAY21, '22' AS DAY22, '23' AS DAY23, '24' AS DAY24, '25' AS DAY25, '26' AS DAY26, '27' AS DAY27, '28' AS DAY28, '29' AS DAY29, '30' AS DAY30, '31' AS DAY31 ) )

SELECT ORG.TEAM_ORG_DESC , OFM.OFFICE_NM , FE.EQUIP_ALIAS , FE.MASTER_IP , FE.EQUIP_ID , FI.IF_NM , FI.IF_DESC , FI.SVC_CONTRACT_NUM AS LL_NUM , (SELECT FACILITY_IF_USG_NM FROM TB_FACILITY_IF_CD FCD WHERE FACILITY_IF_CD = FI.SVC_NET_CD||FI.IF_USG_CD AND ROWNUM=1) AS IF_GRP_NM FROM TB_IF_MST FI INNER JOIN TB_EQUIP_MST FE ON FE.EQUIP_ID = FI.EQUIP_ID INNER JOIN TB_OFFICE_ORG_MAPP_MST OMM ON FE.V_OFFICE_ID = OMM.OFFICE_ID AND FE.SVC_NET_CD=OMM.SVC_NET_CD INNER JOIN TB_OFFICE_MST OFM ON FE.V_OFFICE_ID = OFM.OFFICE_ID INNER JOIN ( SELECT O4.ORG_ID AS HEAD_ORG_ID, O4.ORG_NM AS HEAD_ORG_NM, O4.ORG_DESC AS HEAD_ORG_DESC , O5.ORG_ID AS NSC_ORG_ID, O5.ORG_NM AS NSC_ORG_NM, O5.ORG_DESC AS NSC_ORG_DESC , O6.ORG_ID AS TEAM_ORG_ID, O6.ORG_NM AS TEAM_ORG_NM, O6.ORG_DESC AS TEAM_ORG_DESC FROM MVW_EQUIP_ORG_MST O4 INNER JOIN MVW_EQUIP_ORG_MST O5 ON O4.ORG_ID = O5.HIGHER_ORG_ID INNER JOIN MVW_EQUIP_ORG_MST O6 ON O5.ORG_ID = O6.HIGHER_ORG_ID WHERE O4.HIGHER_ORG_ID ='000001' ) ORG ON OMM.ORG_ID =ORG.TEAM_ORG_ID WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TB_CP_CIRCUIT_MST CC WHERE CC.EQUIP_ID = FI.EQUIP_ID AND CC.IF_NM = FI.IF_NM )
AND FE.EQUIP_ALIAS LIKE '%' || #{search_equip_alias} || '%'
AND FI.SVC_CONTRACT_NUM LIKE '%' || #{search_ll_num} || '%'
AND ROWNUM <= 20

SELECT NVL(MY.PROCESS_CD, 1) PROCESS_CD , DECODE(NVL(MY.PROCESS_CD,1), '1','미적용', '적용') PROCESS_NM , CY.MODELNAMESCODE , CY.MODELNAME , CY.POLLINGYN , DECODE(CY.POLLINGYN,'Y','수집','미수집') POLLINGYN_NM , CY.MFRSCODE , NVL((SELECT VENDOR_NM FROM TB_VENDOR_CD V WHERE VENDOR_CD = NVL(CY.MFRSCODE,MM.MAKER_VENDOR_CD)), CY.MFRSCODE) MFRSNAME , CY.NECATCISCODE , CY.CHANGEDT , NVL(MY.CHNG_TIME, MY.CREATE_TIME) CHNG_TIME , MM.REG_TIME AS NMS_REG_TIME , MY.USER_ID , (SELECT USER_NM FROM TB_USER_MST WHERE USER_ID=MY.USER_ID) USER_NM , DECODE(MM.EQUIP_MDL_NM,NULL, '미수용','수용') AS NMS_MDL_YN , MM.EQUIP_MDL_NM AS NMS_MDL_NM , (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM TB_EQUIP_MST FE WHERE FE.EQUIP_MDL_CD = CY.MODELNAMESCODE) AS NMS_EQUIP_COUNT , DESCRIPTION FROM TB_NMS_NECAT_YD CY LEFT OUTER JOIN TB_EQUIP_MDL_MST MM ON CY.MODELNAMESCODE = MM.EQUIP_MDL_CD LEFT OUTER JOIN TB_MDL_YD MY ON CY.MODELNAMESCODE = MY.EQUIP_MDL_CD
AND NVL(MY.PROCESS_CD,'1') = #{search_process}
AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TB_VENDOR_CD V WHERE VENDOR_CD = NVL(CY.MFRSCODE, MM.MAKER_VENDOR_CD) AND VENDOR_CD LIKE '%' || #{search_vendor} || '%' )
AND CY.MODELNAME '%' || #{search_model_nm} || '%'
